summary: A named project 'Suraj Navodaya App' with an ads feature being added.

existing_features.title: Add React Query hooks for advertisements: useGetAds (fetch all ads), useAddAd (add a new ad mutation with cache invalidation), and useToggleAd (toggle active status mutation) in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts.

Create a new Advertisements page (frontend/src/pages/Advertisements.tsx) that displays active ads as visually styled banner cards with title, description, and an optional external link. Include an admin dialog form to add new ads with fields: title, description, image URL, and link URL. Use the existing maroon-and-gold theme consistent with the rest of the app.

Add an 'Advertisements' navigation entry to the Header component (desktop nav buttons and mobile hamburger menu) and wire up the active page state in App.tsx to render the Advertisements page when selected.

Display a horizontal scrolling or grid preview of active ads on the Home dashboard page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), similar to how recent notices and upcoming exams are previewed, with a 'View All' navigation callback to the Advertisements page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add an Ads/Advertisements data model to the backend with fields: id (Nat), title (Text), description (Text), imageUrl (Text), linkUrl (Text), isActive (Bool), and createdAt (Int). Implement addAd, getAllAds, and toggleAdActive CRUD functions in the main actor.
